problem_text_cn: 1445 用弹簧振子测定重力加速度。[可供仪器和用具] 焦利秤（弹簧、砝码盘、可调支架、游标尺、砝码、小磁钢）；开关型霍耳传感器及计数计时仪等。[要求] (1) 通过测定弹簧振子振动周期的方法，确定弹簧的劲度系数$k$，并写出相应的计算公式。(2) 测弹簧振子周期$T$时，要求测量的相对不确定度≤0.5%。设置霍耳开关和计时仪配合，每次测量周期，启动和制动的操作总不确定度≤±0.02 s。(3) 弹簧本身质量$m_0 = 14.79\ \mathrm{g}$，应将其三分之一计入振子有效质量$pm_0$（$p \approx \frac{1}{3}$），砝码加磁钢总质量为 20.80 g。(4) 写出用此弹簧测定重力加速度的公式，并进行测量。将测量结果与上海地区重力加速度进行比较。
problem_text_en: 1445 Determine gravitational acceleration using a spring oscillator. [Available instruments and tools] Jolly balance (spring, weight pan, adjustable support, vernier scale, weights, small magnetic steel); switch-type Hall sensor and counting timer, etc. [Requirements] (1) Determine the spring stiffness coefficient $k$ by measuring the vibration period of the spring oscillator, and write down the corresponding calculation formula. (2) When measuring the period $T$ of the spring oscillator, require the relative uncertainty of measurement ≤ 0.5%. Set the Hall switch and timer to cooperate, and the total uncertainty of start and stop operations for each period measurement ≤ ±0.02 s. (3) The mass of the spring itself $m_0 = 14.79\ \mathrm{g}$, one-third of which should be included in the effective mass of the oscillator $pm_0$ ($p \approx \frac{1}{3}$), and the total mass of the weight plus magnetic steel is 20.80 g. (4) Write down the formula for measuring gravitational acceleration with this spring and perform the measurement. Compare the measurement result with the gravitational acceleration in Shanghai area.
img_cn: 图1445_1：弹簧振子测量数据及逐差法处理结果
img_en: Fig. 1445_1: Spring oscillator measurement data and results of successive difference method
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】弹簧振子周期$T = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{m + pm_0}{k}}$（$m$为砝码加磁钢质量，$pm_0$为弹簧有效质量，$p \approx \frac{1}{3}$），测 50 次振动时间得$\bar{T} = 0.8708\ \mathrm{s}$，代入得$k = 1.340\ \mathrm{N/m}$。由胡克定律$F = k \cdot \Delta y$，逐差法得每增加 5.00 g 砝码，$\Delta \bar{y} = 36.528\ \mathrm{mm}$，$g/k = \frac{36.528}{5.000} = 7.306\ \mathrm{m/kg}$，故$g = k \cdot 7.306 = 9.790\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$，与上海地区$g = 9.79407\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$百分不确定度 < 0.1%。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Spring oscillator period $T = 2\pi\sqrt{\frac{m + pm_0}{k}}$ ($m$ is the mass of weight plus magnetic steel, $pm_0$ is the effective mass of the spring, $p \approx \frac{1}{3}$), measure the time for 50 vibrations to get $\bar{T} = 0.8708\ \mathrm{s}$, substitute to get $k = 1.340\ \mathrm{N/m}$. From Hooke's law $F = k \cdot \Delta y$, successive difference method gives that for every 5.00 g weight increase, $\Delta \bar{y} = 36.528\ \mathrm{mm}$, $g/k = \frac{36.528}{5.000} = 7.306\ \mathrm{m/kg}$, so $g = k \cdot 7.306 = 9.790\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$, with percentage uncertainty < 0.1% compared with Shanghai area $g = 9.79407\ \mathrm{m/s^2}$.
problem_answer: 弹簧劲度系数：$\boldsymbol{1.340\ \mathrm{N/m}}$；重力加速度：$\boldsymbol{9.790\ \mathrm{m/s^2}}$；与上海地区值百分不确定度 < 0.1%；测量关键：周期法测$k$，逐差法测$g/k$。
